input_summary.subject: Feb 13, 2026 Digest: 1 new message from Walnut Creek School District today

events.title: Public Hearing - Education Parcel Tax
events.location: 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Public hearing by Walnut Creek School District governing board regarding calling an election to levy new $98 education parcel tax

events.title: WCSD Governing Board Public Hearing: New Education Parcel Tax
events.location: District office, 960 Ygnacio Valley Road, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: A public hearing held by the governing board of the Walnut Creek School District to receive public comment regarding whether the District should call an election to create a new $98 parcel tax for nine years, with annual inflation adjustments. Any interested persons, including landowners, may appear and be heard.
